news.headline: Sungrow's event in Milan gathered 200 participants for the future of energy storage in Italy and Europe.
news.summary: On November 21st in Milan, Sungrow organized the Power Up Your Future ESS Experience Day, welcoming more than 200 distinguished attendees from the energy sector in Italy and Europe. The event was held in a location with a historical significance.

news.headline: Susanna Rinne to lead UPM Plywood as interim from Jan 1, 2025. Change in UPM's Group Executive Team.报道称，苏珊娜·林内（Susanna Rinne）担任UPM集团批发业务区的临时负责人，自2025年1月1日起。
news.summary: UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced changes to its board and management on December 2, 2024, at 09:30 EET in Helsinki, Finland. Susanna Rinne will take over the interim leadership of UPM Plywood business area starting January 1, 2025. This change comes as part of a shift in the Group Executive Team.

news.headline: France's RN Member Chenu: RN would vote against French government budget if PM decided to hold a vote on it.
Q3 2024 saw strong financial performance for BW LPG Limited - Shipping rates at US$46,800 per available day. 14.4 million new shares issued for Q3 dividends.
news.summary: In Singapore, the shipping industry had a successful quarter in Q3 2024, with TCE income reaching US$46,800 per available day and US$46,500 per calendar day in total. Avance Gas began delivering vessels on November 1st, and a total of nine ships are set to be delivered in time for Q3 dividends. This delivery involved a share issuance of 14.4 million shares, which raised the total shares outstanding eligible for Q3 dividends to 132.3 million.

news.headline: France's RN Member Chenu: Our no confidence motion is ready.
KKR and Baupost buy 33 Marriott hotels in UK from ADIA; managed by KKR's Amante Capital.
news.summary: Two major investment firms, KKR and The Baupost Group, have revealed a new collaboration to acquire a collection of 33 Marriott International hotels in the UK. This purchase is being made from a subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA). KKR’s European hospitality platform, Amante Capital, will take the lead in managing the joint venture. The acquired hotels will maintain their premium Marriott branding. The portfolio includes 33 full-service hotels and marks a significant investment in the UK hospitality sector.

news.headline: France's 10-Yr bond yield briefly trades above Greece's for first time on record, according to data
Raiven Capital debuts DIFC fund at Abu Dhabi Finance Week, targeting innovative AI and IoT startups in Dubai.
news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, Raiven Capital is introducing a new DIFC fund during Abu Dhabi Finance Week. The fund is fully authorized and aims to invest in innovative founders reshaping industries with AI, IoT, and other cutting-edge technologies. This initiative is part of Raiven Capital's focus on supporting groundbreaking startups that disrupt traditional norms and foster exponential growth. According to Supreet M, Dubai and Abu Dhabi present exceptional prospects for backing visionary entrepreneurs who are pushing boundaries.

news.headline: Aspo's Leipurin expands food ingredients business in Baltics, achieving growth in the region.
news.summary: Press Release: Aspo Plc announces subsidiary Leipurin's expansion in the Baltics on December 2, 2024, at 9:30 am. Leipurin, a subsidiary of Aspo, is set to broaden its food ingredients business in the Baltic region.

news.headline: Swiss Retail Sales YoY Actual 1.4% (Forecast -, Previous 2.2%)
Sosaley in Chennai introduces Battery Health Monitoring System to track individual battery cells for early detection of issues.
news.summary: In Chennai, India, on December 2, 2024, Sosaley introduced its cutting-edge Battery Health Monitoring System (BHMS). This advanced system is designed to monitor every individual cell within a battery bank to identify signs of decay prior to breakdown. Through the analysis of charging and discharging currents, the BHMS aims to optimize battery performance and longevity.

news.headline: French Govt Spokesperson: I am very worried over what could happen in coming days if no-confidence motion against the government succeeds.
ASSA ABLOY buys Premier Steel Doors & Frames in US. Acquisition of US manufacturer of metal doors and frames.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Stockholm on December 2, 2024, ASSA ABLOY revealed their acquisition of Premier Steel Doors and Frames, a prominent US-based company specializing in hollow metal doors and frames, metal building door systems, along with aluminium windows. The deal signifies a strategic move for ASSA ABLOY to expand its presence in the market. There are no specific financial details available at the moment, but this acquisition is expected to significantly boost the company's manufacturing capabilities and product offerings in North America. The CEO expressed excitement about the partnership, highlighting the mutual benefits that this collaboration will bring.

news.headline: Fangzhou Inc. partners with Tencent and Baidu, introduces "AI Agent Solution" in Chengdu summit on Nov 22, 2024.
news.summary: In Chengdu, China, on December 2, 2024, Fangzhou Inc. (06086.HK), a prominent player in Internet healthcare solutions, organized the "Data and AI: Decoding Digital Engagement" summit on November 22, 2024. This event convened important figures from top organizations to discuss the latest trends in digital engagement.

news.headline: DNO ASA finds oil in new offshore Norway play with 50% stake, partners: Aker BP ASA (20%), Petoro AS (20%), and Source Energy AS (10%).
news.summary: In Oslo on 2 December 2024, DNO ASA, a Norwegian oil and gas operator, disclosed a new oil find in license PL1086. The discovery was made in collaboration with partners: Aker BP ASA (20%), Petoro AS (20%), and Source Energy AS (10%), with DNO ASA holding a 50% operated interest in the license.

news.headline: MUFG Bank, Ltd. to start tender offer for WealthNavi Inc. shares (TSE Code: 7342) through its subsidiary.
news.summary: In Tokyo, MUFG Bank, Ltd. (a subsidiary of Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc.) has announced its decision to acquire the share certificates of WealthNavi Inc. through a tender offer under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. This acquisition aims to enhance MUFG Bank's investment in WealthNavi Inc. (TSE Code: 7342) for strategic growth. This move signifies a significant development in the financial sector, with MUFG Bank, Ltd. taking steps to secure a position within the market.

news.headline: £1 billion spent by UK to waste record wind power amount.
Far-right leader threatens to bring down French govt unless a miracle happens.
Trump threatens 100% tariffs on BRICS for creating dollar alternative. Economists split on tactics. Lee sees leverage, while Shakespeare warns of risks.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump has threatened to impose 100% tariffs on BRICS nations if they create an alternative to the U.S. dollar, sparking mixed reactions from economists. Milken Institute Chief Economist William Lee views Trump’s strategy as favoring direct negotiations over multilateral agreements. Lee notes that Trump’s tariff threats are meant to leverage negotiations with major trade partners. On the other hand, British economist Dr. Rodney Shakespeare cautions that these aggressive tactics could have negative repercussions. Shakespeare believes targeting BRICS countries individually could lead to adverse outcomes. The ongoing debate reflects tensions surrounding global trade and currency dominance.

news.headline: Update: Bank acquired its own shares and released results. Stay tuned for week 4 details.
TextMagic AS reduced share capital by €32,725,000 to €850,000. Shareholders to receive €5,015,000 in distributions. €3.26 per share to equity reserve.
news.summary: The shareholders of TextMagic AS decided on May 22, 2024, to decrease the share capital by €32,725,000 to €850,000. This led to an authorized distribution of €0.59 per share, amounting to €5,015,000 for the shareholders. The remaining sum of €3.26 per share was designated to the voluntary equity reserve.

news.headline: Overall voting power.
French CAC 40 stock futures drop 1.1% in early trading as domestic political tensions rise.
Ukraine’s President Zelensky: Ukraine wants to retake occupied land by diplomacy - Kyodo.
UK Nationwide House Price YoY Actual 3.7% (Forecast 2.4%, Previous 2.4%)
UK Nationwide House Price MoM Actual 1.2% (Forecast 0.2%, Previous 0.1%)
Keysight to acquire Spirent Communications for all-cash deal, reaching agreement on March 28, 2024, needing regulatory clearances.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California and London, the boards of Spirent Communications PLC and Keysight Technologies, Inc. disclosed on March 28, 2024, that they have agreed upon an all-cash acquisition deal. The agreement involves the acquisition of all existing and future ordinary shares of Spirent through a Court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Part 26 of the law. Spirent Communications PLC, listed on the London Stock Exchange with the symbol SPT, will be acquired by Keysight Technologies, Inc., traded on the NYSE under the symbol KEYS. The specifics of the deal were not disclosed in the given information.

news.headline: Neo Medical's Spine Care Platform approved under EU MDR, meeting highest quality standards, enabling support to markets.
news.summary: Neo Medical SA, a Swiss technology company focusing on spine surgery, has recently received approval for its complete product range under the European Union’s Medical Device Regulation EU 2017/745. This certification confirms Neo’s adherence to the highest quality control standards for medical devices globally. With this approval, Neo can maintain its support for customers in all markets, providing innovative solutions aimed at enhancing long-term patient outcomes.

news.headline: One Rock Capital Partners acquires Europe Snacks, a top private label snack manufacturer in Europe.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, One Rock Capital Partners, LLC revealed that its affiliate successfully finalized the purchase of Europe Snacks, a top producer of private label savory snacks for the European region. The Company is widely known for its product range and market presence in Europe.

news.headline: Cool Company Ltd announced vesting of RSUs for Primary Insiders on Nov 29, 2024: Richard Tyrrell with 2,232 shares and Johannes Boots with 1,175 shares each.
news.summary: In London, COOL COMPANY Ltd. announced today that as part of their Long-Term Incentive Program (LTIP), some previously awarded restricted stock units (RSUs) granted in 2022 and 2023 were vested on November 29, 2024. Primary Insiders received the following RSUs: Richard Tyrrell received 2,232 shares and Johannes Boots received 1,175 shares. After the recent vesting, Richard Tyrrell now holds 8,545 shares and 8,341 RSUs.

news.headline: TTEC Digital partners with Westcon-Comstor for global sales optimization; completes initial phases.Characters: 87
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Denver, TTEC Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEC), known for its innovative customer experience technology and services, specifically in AI-enabled CX through TTEC Engage and TTEC Digital, revealed that TTEC Digital has successfully finished initial stages of a project.

news.headline: Digita partners with Netmore to enhance LoRaWAN network capabilities in Finland for IoT applications. #IoT #Finland #Netmore #Digita
news.summary: In Stockholm, Netmore Group, a prominent global LoRaWAN network operator, revealed that Digita, a tech company from Finland focusing on broadcast networks and telecom services, has chosen Netmore’s Operator Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) to enhance and grow its LoRaWAN network capabilities for IoT applications in Finland. Digita, a key Finnish network operator, provides comprehensive infrastructure for IoT services.By utilizing Netmore's PaaS solution, Digita aims to improve the efficiency and scalability of its LoRaWAN network to support the increasing demand for IoT services in Finland. This collaboration underscores Digita's commitment to enhancing its network infrastructure to provide advanced IoT solutions.

news.headline: Germany’s Chancellor Scholz: Germany to deliver weapons worth €650m to Ukraine.
Arco Vara AS dividend ex-date is on 5th December 2024, for shareholders entitled to dividends fixed on 6th December 2024.
news.summary: Arco Vara AS has announced that shareholders eligible for dividends will be determined on December 6, 2024, as recorded at the close of the Nasdaq CSD Estonian Settlement System's working day. Consequently, the ex-date for dividend payment is set for December 5, 2024. After this date, new shareholders will not receive dividends for the 2023 fiscal year paid on December 13, 2024.

news.headline: AGM scheduled for Jan 31, 2025, 10:00am CET at HQ to approve financial statements for 2023.
Anoto Group AB changes first trading day for BTAs and subscription rights from December 2 to December 3 on Nasdaq Stockholm.
news.summary: Anoto Group AB has recently disclosed that their board of directors has made changes to the initial trading date for BTAs (paid subscribed shares) and subscription rights on Nasdaq Stockholm in their current rights issue. Originally set for Monday, December 2, 2024, the new date for the first trading day of BTAs and subscription rights will be on Tuesday, December 3, 2024. This adjustment shifts the trading commencement by one day from the previously announced date.

news.headline: Voting rights and capital are key issues; millions raised for campaigns and party funding.
ICG plc announces record profits of £250 million, a 15% increase from last year, due to strong performance in all sectors.
Company repurchases 500,000 of its own shares.
Subsea7 (SUBC) announced share repurchases in accordance with its program during the week starting 25 November 2024.
news.summary: Luxembourg, December 2, 2024 - Subsea 7 S.A. has reported transactions aligning with its share repurchase program for the week starting on November 25, 2024. The company, listed on Oslo Børs as SUBC and on ADR as SUBCY, disclosed key details without specifying the source.

news.headline: Total voting rights and capital information released, with the latest numbers available.
Aerospace Technical Services (ATS) clarifies company structure/ownership, emphasizes compliance/transparency, and global expansion.
news.summary: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, on December 2, 2024, Aerospace Technical Services ("ATS") released a statement to clarify its organizational framework and ownership, emphasizing its dedication to adhering to regulations, openness, and planned growth strategies. ATS, a prominent worldwide supplier of aviation components, affirmed its commitment to these principles as part of its ongoing efforts for transparency and expansion.

news.headline: Enlight Research updates EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS, sets fair value of share at 22.51 euros - €3.51 higher than last closing price and public offering offer price.
news.summary: Enlight Research has revised the equity research and price target for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (stock symbol: EFT1T). The analysis reveals a fair value of 22.51 euros per share in the base scenario, remaining consistent with the previous report released by Enlight Research in September. This value represents an increase of 3.51 euros in comparison to the recent closing price of the stock on the Tallinn Stock Exchange and the offer price of the public share offering that concluded on December 6, 2024.

Ipsos considers acquiring Kantar Media, per recent reports.
Costa aims to halt EU disputes as he assumes leadership, according to Bloomberg.
Hedge funds are increasingly using high-risk all-or-nothing trades in the options market.
